offer: For medical practice managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate matching of patient visits to insurance payments causes cash flow gaps. We provide automated billing reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: Inaccurate matching of patient visits to insurance payments
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical practice managers
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to medical practice managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among practice managers
try_it: Let users manually enter patient visit and payment data
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
